Time for the REAL extras

~ Non-binary Mizuki!!

Sorry, I don't make transfem mizuki nor cis guy Mizuki. Strong NonBinaryMizu believer. If you don't like it... Well.. Thats not your place to make the decision of what I like. Now is it?

~ Based off my real life

This is based off of a convo a random stranger had with my friend while I was “AFK” (i was just eating waffles 🙁). I used Mizuki because she is literally Mizuki and loves Mizuki. We also usually match as MizuEna on roblox. :3

It made me really happy. We've also been friends for a little longer than a year!!

IK I SAID I WOULDNT YAP ABPUT MYSELF. IM SORRY, OK? 🙁
